items.originalTweet: K. Michelle’s son seen doing Uber in a whole Mercedes-Benz in Memphis 👀 he says he wants to earn his own 💰
items.bboCaption:
k. michelle's son out here doing uber in a whole benz in memphis... 💀

i respect the hustle but just say what you mean. is it a humble flex or is memphis too dangerous for this play?

bbo verdict: GUILTY of high-risk hustling ⚖️🔥

items.originalTweet: Ice Spice seen at Nobu with a mystery man 👀
items.bboCaption:
ice spice at nobu with a mystery man. y'all know bbo got the intel.

rate this on a scale of 'staged for pr' to 'she really out here living' — drop your verdict below ⬇️

items.originalTweet: New underground artist from Detroit just went viral with 10M views in 24 hours 📈
items.bboCaption:
detroit stays producing heat 🔥 10m views in 24 hours from an artist nobody knew about yesterday.

finish this sentence: 'detroit rap is _____ right now' — wrong answers ONLY 🗣️

items.originalTweet: Kanye's new merch line selling out in under 3 minutes flat
items.bboCaption:
3 minutes. that's all it took for ye's merch to evaporate 💨

bbo court is in session — is ye the greatest marketer alive or are y'all just addicted to the chaos?

guilty or not guilty ⚖️

items.originalTweet: Bronny seen working out 3x a day to prep for the draft
items.bboCaption:
bronny really out here 3-a-days trying to beat the allegations. 🏀

poll time: A) he's earning his spot B) nepotism still carrying — tap your answer, bbo don't do fence-sitting 🗣️
